label: Capture FPS
notes: Limits capture loop FPS. 0 disables the cap path and the GUI warns at 0 or 61+.

label: Circle mask
notes: Applies the circular capture mask.

label: Use CUDA Direct Capture
notes: CUDA/TensorRT builds only. Available with duplication_api capture.

label: Show Preview Window
notes: Shows the capture preview/debug frame inside the Capture tab.

label: Debug scale
notes: Preview-only scale slider. It is not saved to config.ini.

label: Capture Borders
notes: WinRT capture only. Disabled automatically on unsupported Windows builds.

label: Capture Cursor
notes: WinRT capture only. Includes the cursor in captured frames.

label: Virtual camera width
notes: Applies when capture_method is virtual_camera.

label: Virtual camera heigth
notes: Spelling follows the existing config key. Applies when capture_method is virtual_camera.

label: Disable Headshot
notes: Prevents the head class from being selected as the aim target.

label: Auto Aim
notes: Allows target selection/movement logic to act automatically while held conditions are met.

label: Approximate Body Y Offset
notes: Vertical aim point used for body-class detections.

label: Approximate Head Y Offset
notes: Vertical aim point used for head-class detections.

label: FOV X
notes: Horizontal field of view for the mouse controller.

label: FOV Y
notes: Vertical field of view for the mouse controller.

label: Runtime latency sweep
notes: Enables side-by-side latency sweep behavior for estimator and PID experiments.

label: Enable Kalman estimator
notes: Enables Kalman filtering for target motion estimation.

label: Seed velocity on acquire
notes: Seeds velocity from early measurement deltas during acquisition.

label: Acquisition frames
notes: Frames used to ramp prediction weight after target acquisition.

label: Process noise position
notes: Position process noise. Higher values adapt faster to position changes.

label: Process noise velocity
notes: Velocity process noise. Higher values adapt faster to speed changes.

label: Measurement noise
notes: Measurement noise. Higher values trust detections less.

label: Velocity damping
notes: Damps velocity estimates to reduce runaway prediction.

label: Max velocity (px/s)
notes: Maximum allowed tracked velocity.

label: Warmup frames
notes: Legacy warmup frames when latency sweep is off.

label: Compensate detection delay
notes: Accounts for detector latency in prediction.

label: Additional prediction (ms)
notes: Manual extra prediction offset in milliseconds.

label: Reset timeout (s)
notes: Time without stable observations before estimator state resets.

label: Ego-motion compensation
notes: Opt-in tracker-prior compensation from emitted mouse/view motion. Raw detections, PID observation, and final actuator output are unchanged.

label: Ego compensation strength
notes: Fraction of recent emitted motion subtracted from tracker priors/history to reduce camera-motion jitter.

label: Ego max shift (px @640)
notes: Per-frame compensation clamp at 640 detection resolution; scales with detection_resolution.

label: Ego max age (ms)
notes: Drops stale emitted-motion samples so compensation fails closed.

label: Actuator Hz
notes: PID update rate used by the mouse actuator.

label: Kp
notes: Proportional PID gain.

label: Ki
notes: Integral PID gain.

label: Kd
notes: Derivative PID gain.

label: Deadzone (px)
notes: Minimum error radius before movement is applied.

label: Max step (px/tick)
notes: Maximum movement step per PID tick from the GUI. Runtime clamp allows up to 80.

label: Output scale
notes: Base multiplier applied to PID output.

label: Min output scale
notes: Lower bound for adaptive output scaling.

label: Max output scale
notes: Upper bound for adaptive output scaling.

label: Size reference (px)
notes: Target size used as the neutral reference for size scaling.

label: Small target scale
notes: Minimum scale when targets are smaller than the reference.

label: Large target scale
notes: Maximum scale when targets are larger than the reference.

label: Precision radius / size
notes: Target-size-relative radius where movement is considered precise enough.

label: Slowdown radius / size
notes: Target-size-relative radius where scaling slows approach.

label: Overshoot brake
notes: Reduces movement after crossing past the target.

label: Divergence boost
notes: Boosts output when the target error is growing.

label: Scale response
notes: Responsiveness of adaptive output scale changes.

label: Max integral
notes: Caps integral accumulation.

label: Max derivative term
notes: Caps derivative contribution from a single axis.

label: Derivative filter (ms)
notes: Smoothing time constant for derivative filtering.

label: Target timeout (ms)
notes: Time without target observation before PID state resets.

label: Feed-forward prediction
notes: Adds velocity-based prediction ahead of pure PID output.

label: Feed-forward gain
notes: Strength of feed-forward movement.

label: Feed-forward lookahead (ms)
notes: Prediction lookahead horizon.

label: Feed-forward frame lookahead
notes: Additional frame-based velocity lead used when latency sweep is enabled.

label: Feed-forward max step (px/tick)
notes: Caps feed-forward contribution per tick.

label: Feed-forward min speed (px/s)
notes: Minimum target speed required before feed-forward contributes.

label: Feed-forward confidence floor
notes: Minimum observation confidence for feed-forward contribution.

label: Conditional integration
notes: Prevents integral windup when latency sweep is enabled and error/output conditions are unsafe.

label: Integration error limit (px)
notes: Maximum per-axis error allowed for conditional integral accumulation.

label: Adaptive output scaling
notes: Enables error-magnitude output scaling when latency sweep is enabled.

label: Adaptive error scale (px)
notes: Error distance used as the adaptive output scaling reference.

label: Derivative smoothing multiplier
notes: Multiplies derivative filter tau when latency sweep is enabled.

label: Perspective FOV PID
notes: Uses perspective FOV geometry for PID angular commands when latency sweep is enabled.

label: Enable PID governor
notes: Enables the ONNX PID governor when a compatible model can be loaded.

label: Governor blend
notes: Blend strength for governor-generated PID scales.

label: Governor max speed multiple
notes: Maximum speed multiplier allowed when governor output is active.

label: Sensitivity
notes: Editable for custom profiles. UNIFIED is shown read-only.

label: Yaw
notes: Horizontal degree-to-count conversion for a custom profile.

label: Pitch
notes: Vertical degree-to-count conversion for a custom profile.

label: FOV Scaled
notes: When enabled, the profile also uses a Base FOV value.

label: Base FOV
notes: Shown only when FOV Scaled is enabled on a custom profile.

label: Auto Shoot
notes: Enables automatic shooting behavior.

label: bScope Multiplier
notes: Multiplier used by auto-shoot scope timing/behavior. Disabled in UI until Auto Shoot is on.

label: Arduino 16-bit Mouse
notes: Arduino input only. Sends wider mouse movement values.

label: Arduino Enable Keys
notes: Arduino input only. Enables keyboard key output through Arduino.

label: Enable neural association
notes: Enables learned association/tracking helper logic.

label: Association blend
notes: Blend strength between regular and neural association output.

label: Confidence Threshold
notes: Minimum detector confidence accepted as a detection.

label: NMS Threshold
notes: Non-max suppression overlap threshold.

label: Max Detections
notes: Maximum detections retained after model output processing.

label: Enable Depth Inference
notes: CUDA builds only. DML build shows a requires-CUDA message.

label: Depth FPS
notes: CUDA builds only. 0 disables depth debug update throttling path.

label: Depth Mask FPS
notes: CUDA builds only. Mask update frequency.

label: Enable Depth Mask
notes: CUDA builds only. Masks detections/capture based on estimated depth.

label: Depth Mask Near %
notes: CUDA builds only. Percentile cutoff for the near-depth mask.

label: Depth Mask Expand (px)
notes: CUDA builds only. Expands the generated mask in pixels.

label: Depth Mask Hold Frames
notes: CUDA builds only. Reuses a recent mask for this many detector frames.

label: Depth Mask Alpha
notes: CUDA builds only. Visual alpha for the depth mask overlay.

label: Depth Mask Invert
notes: CUDA builds only. Flips near/far mask selection.

label: Depth Debug Overlay (Game)
notes: CUDA builds only. Shows depth debug output in the game overlay.

label: Enable arrows keys options
notes: Allows arrow-key adjustment of target offsets.

label: Overlay Opacity
notes: Window opacity. The UI clamps to a readable minimum of 220.

label: UI Fine Scale
notes: Fine-grained scaling for the overlay UI.

label: Hide Overlays From Recording
notes: Applies capture exclusion so overlay windows are hidden from supported recording/capture paths.

label: Enable
notes: Enables the separate game overlay renderer.

label: Overlay Max FPS (0 = uncapped)
notes: Caps game overlay render rate. 0 is uncapped.

label: Draw Detection Boxes
notes: Shows detection boxes in the game overlay.

label: Draw Future Positions
notes: Shows predicted future target points.

label: Draw Wind Debug Tail
notes: Shows the wind-mouse debug trail when wind motion is active.

label: Show Target Correction
notes: Shows correction indicators for target prediction/aim adjustment.

label: A
notes: Detection box alpha.

label: R
notes: Detection box red channel.

label: G
notes: Detection box green channel.

label: B
notes: Detection box blue channel.

label: Box Thickness
notes: Detection box line thickness.

label: Draw Capture Frame
notes: Draws the capture frame rectangle.

label: A
notes: Capture frame alpha.

label: R
notes: Capture frame red channel.

label: G
notes: Capture frame green channel.

label: B
notes: Capture frame blue channel.

label: Frame Thickness
notes: Capture frame line thickness.

label: Point Radius
notes: Radius of future-position points.

label: Point Step Alpha Falloff
notes: Controls how quickly future-point alpha fades along the path.

label: Enable Icon Overlay
notes: Enables drawing an icon relative to detections.

label: Icon Width
notes: Icon width in pixels.

label: Icon Height
notes: Icon height in pixels.

label: Icon Offset X
notes: Horizontal icon offset from the selected anchor.

label: Icon Offset Y
notes: Vertical icon offset from the selected anchor.

label: Enable Aim Simulation Window
notes: Shows the aim simulation overlay window.

label: Sim X
notes: Aim simulation window X position.

label: Sim Y
notes: Aim simulation window Y position.

label: Sim Width
notes: Aim simulation window width.

label: Sim Height
notes: Aim simulation window height.

label: Sim FPS Min
notes: Minimum simulated frame rate.

label: Sim FPS Max
notes: Maximum simulated frame rate. The GUI keeps min and max ordered.

label: FPS Jitter
notes: Randomized FPS variance for the simulation.

label: Capture Delay (ms)
notes: Simulated capture delay.

label: Use Live Inference Delay
notes: Uses live backend timing for inference delay instead of the manual value.

label: Inference Delay (ms)
notes: Manual simulated inference delay when not using live timing.

label: Input Delay (ms)
notes: Simulated input delay.

label: Extra Delay (ms)
notes: Additional simulated processing delay.

label: Target Max Speed
notes: Maximum simulated target speed.

label: Target Accel
notes: Simulated target acceleration.

label: Target Stop Chance
notes: Probability that the simulated target pauses during a retarget.

label: Show Delayed Observation
notes: Shows delayed target observation in the simulation.

label: Show Trajectory History
notes: Shows historical target/aim trails.

label: Show Kalman Debug
notes: Shows Kalman-related debug visuals in the simulation.

label: Verbose console output
notes: Enables extra console logging.

label: Enable log file
notes: Writes logs to debug_log_file_path when enabled.

label: Log neural tracker associations
notes: Writes neural association diagnostics to neural_tracker_log_path.

label: Show neural tracker debug
notes: Shows neural tracker debug output in the game overlay path.

label: Detection Resolution
notes: Changes detector input resolution and restarts/reloads dependent paths.

label: Capture method
notes: Selects frame source.

label: Capture target (WinRT)
notes: WinRT only.

label: Window title contains
notes: Used when WinRT target is window.

label: Capture monitor
notes: Monitor list is built from active displays.

label: Virtual camera
notes: Filtered list of DirectShow video input devices.

label: UDP IP
notes: Applied with the Apply UDP Settings button.

label: UDP Port
notes: Applied with the Apply UDP Settings button.

label: Active Game Profile
notes: Selects the active game profile.

label: Game profile rows
notes: Custom profiles can be added/deleted; UNIFIED is read-only.

label: Mouse Input Method
range_or_options: WIN32, GHUB, RAZER, ARDUINO, TEENSY41, KMBOX_NET, KMBOX_A, MAKCU
notes: Changes active mouse backend.

label: Arduino/Teensy Port
notes: Arduino and Teensy 4.1 serial input.

label: Arduino/Teensy Baudrate
notes: Arduino and Teensy 4.1 serial input.

label: Kmbox Net IP
notes: Saved with Save & Reconnect.

label: Kmbox Net Port
notes: Saved with Save & Reconnect.

label: Kmbox Net UUID
notes: Saved with Save & Reconnect.

label: Kmbox A PIDVID
notes: Saved with Save & Reconnect.

label: Makcu Port
notes: Makcu input only.

label: Makcu Baudrate
notes: Makcu input only.

label: Association model
notes: Path to the neural tracker ONNX file.

label: Model
notes: Selects detector model from available files.

label: Backend
notes: CUDA builds only; DML build does not expose this combo.

label: Depth model
notes: CUDA builds only.

label: Depth colormap
notes: CUDA builds only.

label: Targeting Buttons
notes: Supports multiple bindings with + and -.

label: Shoot Buttons
notes: Supports multiple bindings with + and -.

label: Zoom Buttons
notes: Supports multiple bindings with + and -.

label: Exit Buttons
notes: Supports multiple bindings with + and -.

label: Pause Buttons
notes: Supports multiple bindings with + and -.

label: Reload Config Buttons
notes: Supports multiple bindings with + and -.

label: Overlay Buttons
notes: Supports multiple bindings with + and -.

label: Save Config
notes: Immediately writes the current runtime config.

label: Load Config
notes: Merges config.ini into current runtime values and refreshes runtime-sensitive paths.

label: Icon Path
notes: Image path for icon overlay.

label: Icon Class (-1 = all)
notes: Restricts icon to one class when >= 0.

label: Icon Anchor
notes: Anchor point used for icon placement.

label: Screenshot buttons
notes: Supports multiple bindings with + and -.

label: Screenshot delay
notes: Delay before screenshot capture.

label: Log file path
notes: Used when Enable log file is on.

label: Neural tracker log
notes: CSV path for neural association diagnostics.

label: prediction_futurePositions
notes: Number of future target positions to retain/use for prediction visualization. Saved in current config.ini, but no direct GUI control exists.

label: draw_futurePositions
notes: Enables drawing future positions in preview/debug paths. Separate from game_overlay_draw_future.

label: pid_governor_model_path
notes: Model path for the ONNX PID governor. Relative paths are resolved against current/exe parent locations.

label: backend
notes: Selects DirectML or TensorRT backend. GUI combo exists only in CUDA builds.

label: dml_device_id
notes: DirectML adapter index used by ONNX Runtime DML. Not exposed in the GUI.

label: cpuCoreReserveCount
notes: CPU cores reserved away from worker assignment. Not exposed in the GUI.

label: systemMemoryReserveMB
notes: System memory reserve used by runtime resource planning. Not exposed in the GUI.

label: class_player
notes: Detector class id treated as player/body. Not exposed in the GUI.

label: class_head
notes: Detector class id treated as head. Not exposed in the GUI.

label: show_fps
notes: Legacy/debug FPS display flag. Saved in config.ini but not exposed in the current GUI.

label: Games.UNIFIED
notes: Default profile row used for degree-to-count conversion. UNIFIED is shown read-only in the GUI.

label: depth_inference_enabled
notes: Enables depth inference runtime. In the DML build this remains config-only; CUDA builds expose it in AI -> Depth.

label: depth_model_path
notes: Depth model or engine path. In the DML build this remains config-only; CUDA builds expose it in AI -> Depth.

label: depth_fps
notes: Depth debug inference rate. In the DML build this remains config-only; CUDA builds expose it in AI -> Depth.

label: depth_colormap
notes: OpenCV colormap index for depth debug view. In the DML build this remains config-only; CUDA builds expose it in AI -> Depth.

label: depth_mask_enabled
notes: Enables depth mask generation. In the DML build this remains config-only; CUDA builds expose it in AI -> Depth.

label: depth_mask_fps
notes: Depth mask update frequency. In the DML build this remains config-only; CUDA builds expose it in AI -> Depth.

label: depth_mask_near_percent
notes: Near-depth percentile threshold for mask generation. In the DML build this remains config-only; CUDA builds expose it in AI -> Depth.

label: depth_mask_expand
notes: Expands the mask after generation. In the DML build this remains config-only; CUDA builds expose it in AI -> Depth.

label: depth_mask_hold_frames
notes: Frames to hold/reuse the last mask. In the DML build this remains config-only; CUDA builds expose it in AI -> Depth.

label: depth_mask_alpha
notes: Depth mask overlay alpha. In the DML build this remains config-only; CUDA builds expose it in AI -> Depth.

label: depth_mask_invert
notes: Inverts near/far mask selection. In the DML build this remains config-only; CUDA builds expose it in AI -> Depth.

label: depth_debug_overlay_enabled
notes: Shows depth debug overlay in the game overlay. In the DML build this remains config-only; CUDA builds expose it in AI -> Depth.

label: minSpeedMultiplier
notes: Legacy minimum movement speed multiplier. Loadable from config.ini if added manually; saveConfig does not currently emit it.

label: maxSpeedMultiplier
notes: Legacy maximum movement speed multiplier. Loadable from config.ini if added manually; saveConfig does not currently emit it.

label: predictionInterval
notes: Prediction sample interval used by legacy/auxiliary prediction logic. Loadable from config.ini if added manually; saveConfig does not currently emit it.

label: snapRadius
notes: Legacy snap radius. Loadable hidden key; no GUI control.

label: nearRadius
notes: Legacy near-target radius. Loadable hidden key; no GUI control.

label: speedCurveExponent
notes: Legacy speed curve exponent. Loadable hidden key; no GUI control.

label: snapBoostFactor
notes: Legacy snap boost multiplier. Loadable hidden key; no GUI control.

label: easynorecoil
notes: Legacy recoil helper flag. Loadable hidden key; no GUI control and not emitted by saveConfig.

label: easynorecoilstrength
notes: Legacy recoil helper strength. Loadable hidden key; no GUI control and not emitted by saveConfig.

label: wind_mouse_enabled
notes: Enables wind-style motion noise in supported runtime/simulation paths. Loadable hidden key; no GUI control.

label: wind_G
notes: Wind mouse gravity parameter. Loadable hidden key; no GUI control.

label: wind_W
notes: Wind mouse wind parameter. Loadable hidden key; no GUI control.

label: wind_M
notes: Wind mouse max-step parameter. Loadable hidden key; no GUI control.

label: wind_D
notes: Wind mouse damping/distance parameter. Loadable hidden key; no GUI control.

label: export_enable_fp8
notes: Enables FP8 TensorRT export where supported. CUDA builds only; no GUI checkbox.

label: export_enable_fp16
notes: Enables FP16 TensorRT export where supported. CUDA builds only; no GUI checkbox.

label: use_cuda_graph
notes: Enables CUDA graph execution path. CUDA builds only; no GUI checkbox.

label: use_pinned_memory
notes: Uses pinned host memory for CUDA paths. CUDA builds only; no GUI checkbox.

label: gpuMemoryReserveMB
notes: GPU memory reserve for CUDA resource planning. CUDA builds only; no GUI control.

label: enableGpuExclusiveMode
notes: Attempts GPU exclusive mode at startup. CUDA builds only; no GUI checkbox.
